title: Claims Triage Assistant
summary: Summarize claims packets and route cases to the right queue with explainable triage signals.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Claims Triage Assistant is positioned as a Insurtech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Summarize claims packets and route cases to the right queue with explainable triage signals.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on claims, triage, llm.
